summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Automate Accounts e-store. Backend API functionality perfect with 100% success rate. Frontend core features operational with minor session persistence issue during extended testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Login sessions don't persist consistently during extended navigation testing
ui_bugs.status: Intermittent - user can re-login without issues
